title: Apocalypse (h.a.r.)
description:
Survive an sculk infection with weapons, a wonderful landscape and lots of new animals.

This modpack is not optimised for a 3rd Party Server experience, please use Essentials for hosting your world with your friends.

This is made for Forge!
body:
In this datapack you wil be faced against an infection whitch wants to take over the world. You have the ability to craft weapons and devend yourself against the new monsters whitch are evolving over time and getting stronger. It is best to play with your frinds with the inbuild voice chat system thanks to voicemod. Survive in an Wonderful Landscape with big mountains nad valleys thanks to terrablend.

To start the apocalypse you Chave to place a block, because the apocalypse can not be started automatically. This block is called "Ancient Not Block" or similar.

This datapack is made for forge so that more beautiful things can be added freelie, without the hussle to search for compatible mods.

This pack is fully named "Apocalypse (hit and run)"
